channel.title: Fuel Cards on bizOpsPlaybook — Practical Business Plans for Solo Entrepreneurs
channel.description: Recent content in Fuel Cards on bizOpsPlaybook — Practical Business Plans for Solo Entrepreneurs

item.title: Owner-Operator Fuel Cards 2026: Pilot vs TA vs Love's Compare
item.description: Fuel is the single largest variable cost in owner-operator trucking — roughly 38% of total operating expenses per the 2025 ATRI operational cost report. On a truck running 110,000 loaded miles a year at 7 mpg, that’s around 15,700 gallons annually. Every 5 cents saved per gallon = $785 per year. Every 12 cents saved = $1,884 per year. Fuel cards are where those cents get captured — but only if the right card is matched to the right route profile.
